data.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: Possible misdiagnosis. Code correctly treats skill eval failures as non-blocking (STATUS not modified). Real issue may be that skill files fuzzy-match to test files in tests/ which fail, and that unit test failure sets STATUS=failed. CONFIDENCE: medium. FIX: Clarify whether skill-only commits should bypass fuzzy test matching, or if the warning message is the real issue.
